footer.tagline: A curated collection of developer utilities for security, text processing, and everyday workflows — all in one place.
footer.resourcesBody: Found a bug or have an idea for a new tool? <line>Reach out via your preferred channel or open an issue in the project repository.</line>

home.privacyBadge: 100% Client-Side • No Data Leaves Your Browser
home.subheadline: Secure password generators, JSON formatters, encoders, and 20+ developer utilities. Everything runs locally in your browser—your data never leaves your device.
home.privacyFirstBody: All tools run entirely in your browser using JavaScript. No data is ever sent to any server. No analytics, no tracking, no cookies. Your passwords, tokens, and sensitive data stay on your device.

why.instantResultsDesc: No loading, no waiting. Results appear as you type.

home.ctaSubtitle: Explore our full collection of developer tools.

toolsPage.title: Developer Tools
toolsPage.description: {count} client-side tools for security, encoding, generation, and more. All tools run locally in your browser with no data transmission.
toolsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search tools by name or keyword...
toolsPage.noResultsBody: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Learn about our privacy practices, how the tools work, and why you can trust them.
faqPage.privacyBody: Every tool on KeyForge Tools processes your data locally in your browser. No server calls, no analytics, no tracking. Your data stays on your device.

toolLayout.faqSubtitle: Quick answers about usage, privacy, and best practices.
toolLayout.privacyBadgeBody: Everything runs locally in your browser. No data is sent to a server.
toolLayout.privacyNoteBody: This tool runs entirely in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
